name: movecertificate

scripts.build_push: rm -rf ../webroot && mkdir -p ../webroot && node build.mjs && scp ../webroot/*  root@192.168.1.10:/data/adb/modules/MoveCertificate/webroot/ && echo '✅ 构建并推送完成'

author: iyue
description: The MoveCertificate web page is used to display and delete certificates.
